---
title: "Cardinal Nicholas Patrick Stephen Wiseman"
---

## Cardinal Nicholas Patrick Stephen Wiseman

**Dates:** (1802-1865)

### Description

Rector of the English College in Rome

### Biography

He was president of Oscott College, Cardinal Archbishop of Westminster 1850.

### Letters

- Letter from April 10th [1867]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
